summary: No ship: stale lock TTL can be defeated by the original holder heartbeating after expiry, so an expired lock can become live again instead of auto-releasing.

findings.title: Expired planning lock can be resurrected by the old holder heartbeat
findings.recommendation: Make heartbeat refuse expired locks before extending them, e.g. if expired(l, now) return { ok:false, reason:"expired" } and optionally remove the lock only if it is still held by that session. Add a regression test: acquire with a 1s TTL, heartbeat by the same session at t+2s must fail, and a different session must acquire at t+2s.
